summary: Synthetic pooled metadata uses id='pooled-N-runs', union of scenarios/conditions, summed runsPerPair, latest timestamp, comma-joined run IDs in seed field for traceability
context: Added pool_runs() to loader and extended analyze CLI to accept multiple run_dirs, enabling aggregate analysis across repeated benchmark runs.
rationale: Synthetic pooled metadata uses id='pooled-N-runs', union of scenarios/conditions, summed runsPerPair, latest timestamp, comma-joined run IDs in seed field for traceability
